human: The Treaty of Westphalia, signed in 1648, fundamentally restructured European political order. It established the principle of state sovereignty, ending decades of religious conflict. Historians regard it as the foundation of the modern nation-state system, though its precise legacy remains contested among scholars.

Marie Curie was born in Warsaw in 1867. She moved to Paris to study physics and chemistry at the Sorbonne. In 1903 she shared the Nobel Prize in Physics with her husband Pierre and Henri Becquerel, becoming the first woman to win one. She later won a second Nobel, this time in Chemistry, in 1911.

Photosynthesis converts light energy into chemical energy stored in glucose. In plants, this occurs in the chloroplasts, primarily within the leaves. The process requires carbon dioxide, water, and sunlight, and it releases oxygen as a byproduct. Without it, most life on Earth could not exist.

When housing prices fell, these securities lost value rapidly, triggering a cascade of failures. Lehman Brothers filed for bankruptcy in September of that year.

To replace the brake pads, first loosen the lug nuts before you jack up the car. Remove the wheel, then the caliper bolts. Slide the old pads out and the new ones in. Compress the piston with a c-clamp so the caliper fits over the thicker pads. Bolt it all back together and pump the brakes before you drive.

Quantum entanglement describes a correlation between particles such that the state of one instantly relates to the state of another, regardless of distance. Einstein famously called it 'spooky action at a distance.' Experiments since the 1980s have repeatedly confirmed the predictions of quantum mechanics over local hidden-variable theories.

Bees communicate the location of food sources through a behavior known as the waggle dance. A returning forager moves in a figure-eight pattern, and the angle and duration of the central run convey the direction and distance to the flowers. This remarkable system was first decoded by Karl von Frisch, who later received a Nobel Prize for the discovery.
